english translation text: Ziyarat e Arbae’en

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Peace be upon the intimate servant of Allah and His most-beloved.

Peace be upon the friend
of Allah and His elite.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ صَفِيِّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنِ صَفِيِّهِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon the choice
of Allah and son of His choice.
Peace be upon Al-Husayn the wronged and martyred.
Peace be upon the captive of agonies

and victim of the
shed tears.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اَشْهَدُ اَنَّهُ وَلِيُّكَ وَٱبْنُ وَلِيِّكَ
english translation text: O Allah, I do bear witness that he is verily Your intimate servant and son of Your intimate servant,

Your choice and son of
Your choice,
and the winner of Your honoring.

You have honoured him
with martyrdom,

endued him with
happiness,
privileged him with legitimate birth,

made him one of
the chiefs,
one of the leaders,

and one of the defenders
of Your religion,

gave him the inheritances
of the Prophets,

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ ٱلاَوْصِيَاءِ
english translation text: and chose him as argument against Your created beings and one of the Prophets’ successors.
So, he called to You flawlessly,
gave advices,
and sacrificed his soul for You
to save Your servants from ignorance
and perplexity of straying off.

arabic text: وَقَدْ تَوَازَرَ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ غَرَّتْهُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
english translation text:
Yet, those whom were seduced by this
worldly life,

who sold their share
of reward with the lowliest and meanest,

retailed their Hereafter
with the cheapest price,
acted haughtily, perished because of following their desires,

brought to themselves
Your wrath and the wrath of Your Prophet,

arabic text: وَاَطَاعَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ اَهْلَ ٱلشِّقَاقِ وَٱلنِّفَاقِ
english translation text:
and obeyed the dissident and hypocritical servants
of You
and the bearers of the burdens of sins who deserve Hellfire-all those supported each other against him.

However, he fought against them painstakingly with steadfastness expecting
Your reward

until his blood was shed
on account of his
obedience to You
and his women were violated.

O Allah, therefore,
condemn them to hell as
a denunciation and conviction
and chastise them with painful chastisement.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You, O son
of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلاَوْصِيَاءِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You, O son
of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

arabic text: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ اَمِينُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنُ اَمِينِهِ
english translation text: I bear witness that You are verily the trustee of Allah and the son of His trustee.
You lived with happiness,
passed away with praiseworthiness,
and died missed, wronged, and martyred.

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُنْجِزٌ مَا وَعَدَكَ
english translation text:
I also bear witness that
Allah shall inevitably fulfil His promise to You,
exterminate those who disappointed You,

and chastise those who
slew You.

I also bear witness that
You fulfilled Your pledge to Allah

arabic text: وَجَاهَدْتَ فِي سَبِيلِهِ حَتَّىٰاَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
english translation text:
and strove hard in His
way until death came
upon You.
So, may Allah withhold His mercy on those who slew You.
May Allah withhold His mercy on those who wronged You.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
english translation text: May Allah withhold His mercy on the people who, when informed about that, were pleased with it.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اُشْهِدُكَ اَنِّي وَلِيٌّ لِمَنْ وَالاَهُ
english translation text: O Allah, I do ask You to witness for me that I am loyalist to those who are loyalists to him

and enemy of those who
are enemies of him.

arabic text: بِاَبِي اَنْتَ وَاُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: May my father and mother be accepted as ransoms for You, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلاَصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ
english translation text:
I bear witness that You
were light in the sublime loins
and purified wombs;
the impurities of the Ignorance Era could not object You to filth
nor could its murky clothes dress You.

I also bear witness that
You are one of the
mainstays of the religion,
the supports of Muslims,
and the haven of the believers.

I also bear witness that
You are the God-fearing, pious,
pleased, immaculate,
guide, and well-guided Imam.

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّ ٱلاَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ كَلِمَةُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
english translation text: And I bear witness that the Imams from Your progeny are the spokesmen of piety,
the signs of guidance,
the firmest handle of Islam,
and the decisive Argument against the inhabitants of the world.

I also bear witness that
I believe in You all and in Your Return,
I have full confidence in the laws of my religion and in the seals of my deeds,
my heart is at peace with You all,
all my affairs are based on Your commands,

and my support for You
all is already all set
until Allah permits You.

So, I am with You.
I am with You,
not with Your enemies.
Allah’s blessings be upon You,
upon Your souls, upon Your bodies,
upon the present and the absent from You,
and upon the apparent and the invisible from You.

Respond to us, O Lord
of the Worlds.
